narrative:
Monroe / Pike (precinct in Madison County) has 1,284 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.2 percentage points.
